name: Pipedrive

composio_registry_match.name: Pipedrive
composio_registry_match.description: Pipedrive is a sales management tool built around pipeline visualization, lead tracking, activity reminders, and automation to keep deals progressing

description: A web-based sales CRM and pipeline management platform designed to help businesses plan sales activities and monitor deals.
notes: Pipedrive is widely known for its developer-friendly REST API. It supports OAuth 2.0 for marketplace integrations and personal API tokens for simple scripts, with broad endpoint coverage as reflected in its 399 tools on Composio.
